concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for passive View enforcement.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] = 'primitives' AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PointerEvent.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Scene.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Signal.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Support.java') THEN 'SUPPORT_VALUE' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'InspectorEntry.java' THEN 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Binder.java' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Contribution.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewLayerType

constraint.description: Passive panel views name their fixed shell surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND NOT ( (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'View') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.leftbartabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND (type.name ENDS WITH 'ControlsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'MainView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView')) OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.dropdowns\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'TopBarView') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.statetabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView') ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'area-specific passive view suffix: leftbartabs use *ControlsView/*MainView/*StateView, dropdowns use *TopBarView, statetabs use *StateView, slotcontent including slotcontent/primitives uses *View' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive view names must identify the shell surface they render.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each passive view source file owns exactly one top-level panel fragment.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level passive panel view type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A passive view file must define exactly one panel fragment.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views depend only on their allowed co-located model surface and passive views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE source.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND NOT ( ( target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) OR ( target.viewBucket = 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) OR ( target.viewBucket = 'SUPPORT_VALUE' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[3] = 'primitives' ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] <> 'primitives' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[3] = 'primitives' ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = 'primitives' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[3] = 'primitives' ) ) ) OR ( target.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND ( ( sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) OR targetSegments[3] = 'primitives' ) ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, 'same-root model/view/input-event surfaces, passive reusable slotcontent, or allowed primitive support values only' AS ExpectedDirection, target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive views may depend only on co-located passive-view surfaces and documented reusable support seams.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, ActualDirection
